Didn't exist prior to Protestant Reformation<ref>https://youtu.be/x90XKjhcu4w?t=1380</ref>

It is related to [[Anti-organizationalism]]

== Why it's bad ==
Personal religion doesn't help people connect with each other so it misses the first plague (alpha alpha) of [[alienation]].

== See Also ==

* [[organized religion]]

== References ==

[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Personal Religion]][[Category:Alienators]]
[[sn:Personal Religion]]
[[Category:Pages]]
